'''gasasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmol|osmol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmol|osmol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gasasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæsæshæth|gæsæshæth]] || [[word:gæsæshæj|gæsæshæj]] || [[word:gæsæshæsh|gæsæshæsh]] || [[word:gæsæshæ|gæsæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasasashath|gasasashath]] || [[word:gasasashaj|gasasashaj]] || [[word:gasasashash|gasasashash]] || [[word:gasasasha|gasasasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasashath|gasashath]] || [[word:gasashaj|gasashaj]] || [[word:gasashash|gasashash]] || [[word:gasasha|gasasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasafshath|gasafshath]] || [[word:gasafshaj|gasafshaj]] || [[word:gasafshash|gasafshash]] || [[word:gasafshaf|gasafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gasashatha|gasashatha]] || [[word:gasashaja|gasashaja]] || [[word:gasashasha|gasashasha]] || [[word:gasashaka|gasashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gasashath|gasashath]] || [[word:gasashaj|gasashaj]] || [[word:gasashash|gasashash]] || [[word:gasasha|gasasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gasashathal|gasashathal]] || [[word:gasashajal|gasashajal]] || [[word:gasashashal|gasashashal]] || [[word:gasashakal|gasashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gasashathatha|gasashathatha]] || [[word:gasashajaja|gasashajaja]] || [[word:gasashashasha|gasashashasha]] || [[word:gasashaka|gasashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gasashathan|gasashathan]] || [[word:gasashajan|gasashajan]] || [[word:gasashashan|gasashashan]] || [[word:gasashakan|gasashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gasashathaoro|gasashathaoro]] || [[word:gasashajaoro|gasashajaoro]] || [[word:gasashashaoro|gasashashaoro]] || [[word:gasashakaoro|gasashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
